text:
敵の動きに合わせ
一瞬のうちに弱点を叩く……！
先生、さすがです！

今後、ダガンと対峙したさいには
この方法で打ち破りたいと思います！

先生、ご指導のほど
ありがとうございました！
またよろしくお願いいたしま

You stayed one step ahead of the enemy's
movements and whacked its weak point in the
blink of an eye. I'm speechless, Teachless!

I hope I can pull off moves even HALF that
slick when it's my turn to face a Dagan!

I totally toot your tutelage, Teach!
Looking forward to learning more from you!
